comment: Real autonomy test set. Each task asks the real Code Buddy agent to edit a stub .mjs file in an isolated sandbox so its self-verifying .check.mjs exits 0. 'priority: high' routes a task up the model ladder (escalateAtPriority). slug-id dependsOn slugify to exercise the DAG.

tasks.title: Implement slugify() in slugify.mjs
tasks.description: Edit slugify.mjs so slugify(input) lowercases the string, replaces every run of non [a-z0-9] characters with a single '-', and strips leading/trailing '-'. The acceptance test is `node slugify.check.mjs` (must exit 0). Do not edit the .check.mjs file.

tasks.title: Implement luhnValid() in luhn.mjs
tasks.description: Edit luhn.mjs so luhnValid(number) returns true iff the digit string passes the Luhn checksum (double every second digit from the right, subtract 9 if >9, sum, must be a multiple of 10); return false for empty or non-digit input. The acceptance test is `node luhn.check.mjs` (must exit 0). Do not edit the .check.mjs file.

tasks.title: Implement slugId() in slug-id.mjs (reusing slugify)
tasks.description: Edit slug-id.mjs so slugId(title, n) returns slugify(title) + '-' + n, reusing the slugify already exported from ./slugify.mjs (do not reimplement it). The acceptance test is `node slug-id.check.mjs` (must exit 0). Do not edit the .check.mjs file.
